title: fix: rotate Azure gptimage endpoints to new April deployments
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Fresh endpoints for April
gist.blurb: Rotated our Azure image generation endpoints to fresh April deployments. Just keeping the pixels flowing smoothly behind the scenes.
gist.summary: Updated the backend Azure endpoints for the gpt-image-1-mini and gpt-image-1.5 models to new April deployments.
gist.impact: Ensures continued reliability and uptime for image generation without any changes required from users.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the monitor robot doing routine maintenance, swapping out glowing server cartridges in a cozy garden shed data center.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot swapping out glowing lime green (#ecf874) server cartridges in a cozy garden shed data center. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot swapping out glowing lime green (#ecf874) server cartridges in a cozy garden shed data center.
